personas.name: Mindful User
personas.description: A meditation enthusiast seeking a reliable and user-friendly app for their daily practice.
goals: Access a variety of meditation content
Enjoy a stable and easy-to-use app
personas.context: The user regularly practices meditation and relies on the app to support their mental well-being. They value a simple and minimalistic design, but sometimes encounter technical issues that disrupt their practice.

personas.name: Value-Conscious Meditator
personas.description: A user seeking free or low-cost meditation apps with valuable features.
goals: Try meditation apps without upfront payment
Access a wide variety of meditation courses and sounds
Meditate regularly without breaking the bank
pain_points: Encountering paywalls or donation demands before trying the app
Feeling forced to upgrade or subscribe to access core features
personas.context: The user is looking for a meditation app that offers a free experience or a low-cost option to try before committing to a paid subscription. They value being able to access a range of meditation courses and sounds without feeling pressured to pay.

personas.name: Mindful Seeker
personas.description: A person seeking to improve their mental well-being through meditation and mindfulness.
personas.context: The user is likely someone who has struggled with mental health issues, such as anxiety and stress, and is looking for a free and accessible way to practice meditation and mindfulness. They value a user-friendly and well-designed app that can guide them on their journey.

personas.name: Mindful User
personas.description: A user seeking to establish a consistent meditation habit and appreciate features that support engagement and motivation.
goals: Find a simple and accessible meditation app
pain_points: App lockups or difficulties starting sessions
Lack of daily reminders or notifications
Volume issues with timer or sounds
personas.context: The user is likely someone who values mindfulness and meditation as part of their daily routine, possibly looking for tools to help them stay consistent and motivated. They use the app daily, often at the same time, and appreciate features that support habit formation.

personas.name: Satisfied Meditator
personas.description: A highly satisfied user who finds the app life-changing and productive.
goals: Use meditation to improve mental well-being
Find a reliable and free meditation resource
pain_points: Difficulty finding a suitable meditation app
personas.context: The user is likely someone who was struggling with stress or mental well-being and found the app to be a game-changer. They appreciate the app's effectiveness, ease of use, and that it's completely free.
